name: Hua Man
page_title: Hua Man 花鬘 [Nanman, Shu] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
novel_notes:
Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
	
		
	Hua Man did not appear in history or the novel.

sections.novel: Hua Man is the fictional daughter of Meng Huo and Zhurong, of the Nanman kingdom. She makes an appearance in Koei’s Romance of the Three Kingdoms game series, but does not appear in the novel or in history. A warrior, she goes to battle against Guan Suo, son of Guan Yu and officer of Shu, but is captured. She later marries Guan Suo, but dies at the age of thirty.
sections.short-biography: Hua Man is the fictional daughter of Meng Huo, as found in Koei games.

full_text:
Hua Man 花鬘
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Hua Man (花鬘). Hua Man is the fictional daughter of Meng Huo, as found in Koei games. Hua Man is a fictional character. Hua Man was affiliated with Nanman and the Shu Kingdom.

Fact vs Fiction
Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
Hua Man did not appear in history or the novel.
BiographyFictional Biography
Hua Man is the fictional daughter of Meng Huo and Zhurong, of the Nanman kingdom. She makes an appearance in Koei’sRomance of the Three Kingdomsgame series, but does not appear in the novel or in history. A warrior, she goes to battle against Guan Suo, son of Guan Yu and officer of Shu, but is captured. She later marries Guan Suo, but dies at the age of thirty.
